steps.title: Read the graph directions
steps.content: The parabola opens upward, so the coefficient of $x^2$ must be positive. The line rises from left to right, so its slope must also be positive.

steps.title: Check the visible intersection
steps.content:
The positive-coefficient system also fits the visible intersection at $(4,7)$:
$$\frac{7}{16}(4)^2=\frac{7}{16}\cdot 16=7$$
and
$$\frac{7}{4}(4)=7$$

steps.title: Choose the positive pair
steps.content: The system with an upward-opening parabola and a positive-slope line is the matching choice. The answer is D.
